name: SlIcon
description: PROPOSED contract extracted from extract/pilots/shoelace/custom-elements.json (components/icon/icon.js) (cem adapter) — API surface only; anatomy, tokens, and design bindings await reconciliation and human review.

props.name: label
props.description:
An alternate description to use for assistive devices. If omitted, the icon will be considered presentational and
ignored by assistive devices.

props.name: library
props.description: The name of a registered custom icon library.

events.name: load
events.description: Emitted when the icon has loaded. When using `spriteSheet: true` this will not emit. (CEM event "sl-load")

events.name: error
events.description: Emitted when the icon fails to load due to an error. When using `spriteSheet: true` this will not emit. (CEM event "sl-error")
